---
title: "🗓️ Unit 13 - Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR)"
---

This week we will get familiar with SAR fundamentals.


## 👨‍🏫 Lecture  

[SAR-Introduction](https://drive.google.com/file/d/14RnPLr14g5tLVEsNDjiKdqvM2pgmWgLv/view?usp=sharing)


## Recommended reading

[A Tutorial on Synthetic Aperture Radar](https://elib.dlr.de/82313/1/SAR-Tutorial-March-2013.pdf)


## ✍️ Coursework

🚧   
- Keep doing your *Examen 2*

- Keep experimenting for your *Informe 2*.
🚧
